allow: PowerShell(cd "D:\\Android projec"; $excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $excel.Visible = $false; $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open\("D:\\Android projec\\export_23_04_26_736.xlsx"\); $sheets = $wb.Sheets | ForEach-Object { $_.Name }; Write-Output "Sheets: $sheets"; foreach\($sheetName in $sheets\) { $ws = $wb.Sheets.Item\($sheetName\); $lastRow = $ws.UsedRange.Rows.Count; $lastCol = $ws.UsedRange.Columns.Count; Write-Output "=== Sheet: $sheetName \(${lastRow}r x ${lastCol}c\) ==="; for\($r=1; $r -le [Math]::Min\(5,$lastRow\); $r++\) { $row = @\(\); for\($c=1; $c -le $lastCol; $c++\) { $row += $ws.Cells.Item\($r,$c\).Text }; Write-Output \($row -join " | "\) } }; $wb.Close\($false\); $excel.Quit\(\))

PowerShell(cd "D:\\Android projec"; $excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $excel.Visible = $false; $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open\("D:\\Android projec\\export_23_04_26_736.xlsx"\); $ws = $wb.Sheets.Item\("info"\); $lastRow = $ws.UsedRange.Rows.Count; Write-Output "=== Info Sheet \(all rows\) ==="; for\($r=1; $r -le $lastRow; $r++\) { $a = $ws.Cells.Item\($r,1\).Text; $b = $ws.Cells.Item\($r,2\).Text; Write-Output "$a | $b" }; $wb.Close\($false\); $excel.Quit\(\))

PowerShell(cd "D:\\Android projec"; $excel = New-Object -ComObject Excel.Application; $excel.Visible = $false; $wb = $excel.Workbooks.Open\("D:\\Android projec\\export_23_04_26_736.xlsx"\); $ws = $wb.Sheets.Item\("export_23_04_26_736"\); $lastRow = $ws.UsedRange.Rows.Count; $catNotes = @{}; for\($r=2; $r -le $lastRow; $r++\) { $type = $ws.Cells.Item\($r,2\).Text; $cat = $ws.Cells.Item\($r,4\).Text; $note = $ws.Cells.Item\($r,6\).Text; if\($note -ne ""\) { $key = "$type | $cat"; if\(-not $catNotes.ContainsKey\($key\)\) { $catNotes[$key] = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]::new\(\) }; if\($catNotes[$key].Count -lt 5\) { $catNotes[$key].Add\($note\) } } }; $catNotes.GetEnumerator\(\) | Sort-Object Key | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "[$\($_.Key\)]"; $_.Value | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  -> $_" } }; $wb.Close\($false\); $excel.Quit\(\))
